True Heart Snatch Arrow.name: True Heart Snatch Arrow
True Heart Snatch Arrow.description: Fire a Bow attack on enemies within a range of 150, dealing 150% Damage, with a 75% chance (affected by EFF Hit) to inflict 2 turns of Weak status (Anger gain reduced by 50%).

Holy Spirit Body.name: Holy Spirit Body
Holy Spirit Body.description: When attacked by a unit carrying a negative status, reduce that attack's Damage by 95%.
